expectations.evidence: Part 2 labeled 'PAIN x PERSONA MATRIX' with 5 ED-specific pain intersections mapped to angles

expectations.text: Names specific messaging angles (not just topics)
expectations.evidence: 5 named angles e.g. 'Your grant voice ate your mission voice', 'You wrote a speech. You didn't say the thing.'

expectations.text: Uses canonical RP personas (ED / Founder / Org-in-transition) rather than inventing new ones
expectations.evidence: Locks persona to canonical ED segment and explicitly contrasts vs Founder/Org-in-transition

expectations.text: Names Mirror tier explicitly and maps angles to it
expectations.evidence: Title names 'Mirror ($900-1,800 single session)' and Most-Aware CTAs reference Mirror price across all 5 angles

expectations.text: Names specific ED-level pains (not generic 'needs better marketing')
expectations.evidence: Grant voice ate mission voice, gala speech dread, inherited founder language, staff can't articulate mission
